heading: Definition of the term “person”
label: 5690 Definition of the term “person”
text: The term “person”, as used in this subchapter, includes an officer or employee of a corporation or a member or employee of a partnership, who as such officer, employee, or member is under a duty to perform the act in respect of which the violation occurs.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5690, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 702Pub. L. 85–859
